title: Buzchub

{{Quote|I have employment for you to do, if interested you are. Several crates of spice has my employer—Nigel VI they are on, Lohopa II they need to go. Transportation they need, pay well we will. Five thousand credits, twenty more upon delivery.|Und'l|<ref name="TSK" />}}
The '''Buzchub''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of stocky beings covered in [[Color/Legends|dark blue]] fur. The [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] were believed to be native to [[Harrandarr]], a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bosph sector/Legends|Bosph sector]]. The Buzchub enjoyed traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], using mechanical [[Transliterator|translators]] to communicate with other species. Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Buzchub [[Und'l]] worked for sympathizers of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], although he believed his employers were simply [[Spice/Legends|spice]] shippers.

==Biology and appearance==
The Buzchub were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] covered in [[Color/Legends|dark blue]] fur. They were stocky and had a wiry strength that was not immediately obvious. Each Buzchub had a round face with two round, lidded [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]; a stubby nose; and a broad mouth. Their vocal cords were physically incapable of speaking [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]]. The Buzchub had a waddling gait, and an individual could grow to 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height.<ref name="TSK" />

==Society and culture==
{{Quote|Help you I will, if take me you will.|Und'l|<ref name="TSK" />}}
The Buzchub were a relatively peaceful species. They had an affinity for [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], considering them to be their "long-haired brothers." While incapable of speaking Basic, they could understand it, and [[Realspace/Legends|spacefaring]] Buzchub utilized mechanical [[Transliterator|translators]] that they wore around the neck in order to communicate in the language. Some Buzchub, such as [[Und'l]], spoke with a peculiar rhythm, using short, paired phrases. Buzchub were not overly curious about other species or technology, but they thoroughly enjoyed traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TSK" />

==History==
The Buzchub were believed to be native to [[Harrandarr]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the remote [[Bosph sector/Legends|Bosph sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> In the period following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the Buzchub Und'l traveled the galaxy. He began working for people he believed to be [[Spice/Legends|spice]] shippers, but who were in fact sympathizers of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. For these employers, Und'l made contact with a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] on the planet [[Roldalna]], arranging for them to ship spice from [[Nigel VI]] to [[Lohopa II]] in exchange for 25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. In truth, the cargo was [[lexonite]], a deadly [[Poison/Legends|poison]] used by Imperial [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] groups.<ref name="TSK" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Buzchub were created by [[Dave Marron]] for the mini-adventure [[The Package (adventure)|''The Package'']], included in [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']], a collection of adventures published by [[West End Games]] in [[1993]]. Und'l the Buzchub was illustrated by [[John Paul Lona]]. They were later mentioned in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]].
